packageRules.description: Pin the wiki-gsi MariaDB image to the 10.11 series during the staged 10.6 -> 10.11 -> 11.4 upgrade (issue #521). Major bumps modify the data dir in place and must run mariadb-upgrade one stage at a time with verification between, not be applied automatically by renovate. Loosen to the next stage's ceiling as each stage lands.
